'''kokayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:picketable|picketable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:picketable|picketable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kokayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kokayithi || kokayiji || kokayishi || kokayiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kokayuthu || kokayuju || kokayushu || kokayuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kokayuthu || kokayuju || kokayushu || kokayuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kokayufthuf || kokayufjuf || kokayufshuf || kokayufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || kokayethe || kokayeje || kokayeshe || kokayeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || kokayotho || kokayojo || kokayosho || kokayoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || kokayotho || kokayojo || kokayosho || kokayoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || kokayofthof || kokayofjof || kokayofshof || kokayofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kokayïfthïf || kokayïfjïf || kokayïfshïf || kokayïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kokayïfthïf || kokayïfjïf || kokayïfshïf || kokayïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kokayïfthïf || kokayïfjïf || kokayïfshïf || kokayïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kokayïfthïf || kokayïfjïf || kokayïfshïf || kokayïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || kokayæthæ || kokayæjæ || kokayæshæ || kokayækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || kokayatha || kokayaja || kokayasha || kokayaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || kokayatha || kokayaja || kokayasha || kokayaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || kokayafthaf || kokayafjaf || kokayafshaf || kokayafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || kokayasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || kokayshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || kokayroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || kokaymuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || kokayyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokokaynkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokokaynkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokokaynkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokokaynkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || kokakayasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || kokakayshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || kokakayroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || kokakaymuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || kokakayyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokokakaynkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokokakaynkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokokakaynkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokokakaynkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || kekæyasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || kekæyshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || kekæyroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || kekæymuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || kekæyyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokekæynkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokekæynkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokekæynkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokekæynkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || kokfayasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || kokfayshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || kokfayroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || kokfaymuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || kokfayyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokokfaynkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokokfaynkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokokfaynkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokokfaynkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
